title: Chalumeau Bare-Bones Starter Packet
artifact_focus: Root-level review packet for a single-reed stopped-pipe chalumeau scaffold.
fabrication_authority: not build-ready; CAD/DXF/design-table authority requires review and measured prototype feedback
measurement_status: TBD; no measured Tony-built prototype data in this root packet

required_before_public: Select and record the commercial reed/mouthpiece setup for the first soprano prototype.
Measure all-closed root pitch and tone-hole sweep on a physical prototype.
Log tone-hole enlargement, cents error, and response before accepting the schedule.
Validate optional K01/K02 keywork with leak-light or suction testing before pitch claims.
Declare reviewed CAD/DXF/design-table fabrication authority after measured feedback.
Live-check sourcing, prices, lead times, and substitutions before purchase.
Replace or supplement attributed reference images with Tony-built prototype photos.

sources.title: Existing build packet
sources.credit: Detailed generated packet and tables already present in build/packet and build/data.

sources.title: Workbook inspection summary
sources.credit: Documents why the packet uses stopped cylindrical single-reed assumptions.

sources.title: Image attributions
sources.credit: Reference photos are attributed source images, not Tony-built prototype photos.
